title: Expose reusable MCP registration function
description: Current: src/index.ts registers all tools inline in main(), which integration tests cannot reuse directly. Expected: a reusable exported registration function wires all tools/resources in one place and main() delegates to it without behavior changes.
acceptance_criteria: src/index.ts exports a registration function that registers the same tools/resources as before
main() uses the exported registration function and preserves existing transport startup behavior
Integration smoke test imports the registration function and verifies it can execute against a mock server
out_of_scope: Changing CLI flags or transport logic
Updating package version or publish metadata
